mapper.sql: AA.RAW_SEQ , AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.RAW_NAME , AA.PROD_COMPANY , AA.PROD_COUNTRY , AA.SUPPLIER , AA.WEIGHT , AA.USE_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM

FF.RAW_DETAIL_SEQ , FF.RAW_SEQ , FF.MEMB_SEQ , FF.TITLE , FF.HASHTAG , FF.FILE_ID , FF.RAW_DESC , FF.RAW_DETAIL , FF.VIEW_CNT , FF.REQUEST_CNT , FF.PERMIT_YN , FF.USE_YN , FF.DEL_YN , FF.RGTR , FF.RGT_DTTM , FF.CHNR , FF.CHNG_DTTM , FF.DLTR , FF.DLT_DTTM

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.RAW_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(PI.PTN_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(MI.MEMB_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getList */
WITH rep AS ( SELECT bb.raw_seq, COUNT(DISTINCT id.id) AS rep_cnt, string_agg(DISTINCT id.rep_name , ', ' ORDER BY id.rep_name) AS rep_name_join, string_agg(DISTINCT id.rep_name_en , ', ' ORDER BY id.rep_name_en) AS rep_name_en_join FROM T_RAW_ELEMENT_INF bb JOIN T_INGD_DIC id ON bb.RAW_ELM_ID = id.ID GROUP BY bb.raw_seq )
SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.*,ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS RN, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT
,
, COALESCE(R.rep_cnt, 0) AS ingd_cnt , COALESCE(R.rep_name_join, '-') AS ingd_names , COALESCE(R.rep_name_en_join, '-') AS ingd_names_en
, PI.PTN_NAME , MI.MEMB_NAME , EE.MEMB_SEQ AS MANAGER_SEQ , MI.USE_YN AS MEMB_USE_YN FROM T_RAW_MST AA INNER JOIN T_RAW_MANAGER EE ON AA.RAW_SEQ = EE.RAW_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN T_RAW_DETAIL FF ON AA.RAW_SEQ = FF.RAW_SEQ AND EE.MEMB_SEQ = FF.MEMB_SEQ AND FF.DEL_YN = 'N' INNER JOIN T_PARTNER_INF PI ON AA.PTN_SEQ = PI.PTN_SEQ INNER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON EE.MEMB_SEQ = MI.MEMB_SEQ
LEFT OUTER JOIN rep R ON AA.RAW_SEQ = R.RAW_SEQ
order by AA.RAW_SEQ desc, MI.MEMB_TYPE, MI.MEMB_SEQ ) A ) B
WHERE RN BETWEEN (#{offset} + 1) AND #{offset} + #{rowSize}

/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_RAW_MST AA INNER JOIN T_RAW_MANAGER EE ON AA.RAW_SEQ = EE.RAW_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN T_RAW_DETAIL FF ON AA.RAW_SEQ = FF.RAW_SEQ AND EE.MEMB_SEQ = FF.MEMB_SEQ AND FF.DEL_YN = 'N' INNER JOIN T_PARTNER_INF PI ON AA.PTN_SEQ = PI.PTN_SEQ INNER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON EE.MEMB_SEQ = MI.MEMB_SEQ

/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getGarbageListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_RAW_MST AA INNER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON AA.RGTR = MI.MEMB_SEQ
